title: Lead SEO Specialist at Delhivery Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Delhivery Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the Delhivery Ventures Solutions family as a SEO Specialist in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Delhivery Ventures Solutions:
Delhivery Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Ventures Solutions!
